description: Delivery Hub demo data manifest. The actual records are inserted via scripts/load-demo-data.apex (Anonymous Apex). This file documents the dataset for reference.

records.title: Implement SSO integration with Azure AD
Fix payment processing timeout on large invoices
Add export to CSV feature for report dashboards
Build automated email notification system for case updates
Migrate legacy REST API to Salesforce Connect (OData)
Create executive KPI dashboard with real-time metrics
Implement field-level encryption for PII data
Set up CI/CD pipeline with CumulusCI and GitHub Actions
Fix duplicate contact merge losing activity history

entities.note: Org defaults with activity logging, field tracking, bell notifications, and board metrics enabled
